name: io.github.mrmaciej1/justfill
title: JustFill PDF Forms
description: Detect, review and fill PDF form fields - scans included - via justfill.app

environmentVariables.name: JUSTFILL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from justfill.app -> Account -> API Keys. Optional: `justfill-mcp login` stores one via the browser instead.
